lines: I listened to my audiobook “the mountain is you”.
Healing is usually thought of as peaceful and enjoyable and comfortable but it is the complete opposite

Healing your mind is different than healing your body. You’re gutting yourself and becoming new. 

Healing the body puts you back into a previous state, while healing mentally/emotionally is totally new transformation into something new
You do not find resolutions in avoiding the problem.

I’m learning that motivation can be really bad if not used properly. What I mean by that is motivation is a trap that everyone falls for. It feels amazing in the moment, it gives you that rush and surge of I can conquer the world energy but then it fades fast. And you crash harder than before.
This is why consistency is different. It doesn’t need good feelings to survive. It doesn’t care if you’re having a bad day. It just needs commitment.

If you picture a river cutting through solid rock is not because of raw power. It’s the persistence of the river. It doesn’t take days off. It doesn’t wait to feel motivated. It keeps flowing day after day. Drop after drop and it quietly shapes the hardest stone on either.
Consistency does this for our life. It might look slow on the outside but it’s unstoppable
I’m grateful to make pizzas with my family and include my mom and nephew. It’ll be a fun experience for everyone
It went very well and everyone enjoyed it
I feel really good. It was a great day. The pizzas went exceptionally!
I have been able to genuinely feel a star of gratitude.
Gratitude is an emotional and cognitive state of appreciation, thankfulness, or recognizing goodness in one’s life
I am grateful for the new trick of creating a habit. I can really see a difference already and it’s only been 3 days. Make it easy. 2 minute rule (atomic habits)
I feel good. I feel positive. Maybe just like I have too many things to do but all things I can handle.

For understanding now that I waste a lot of my time. 

Seneca taught me that
Generating massive amounts of action is all we knew from the beginning. (the 10x Rule)

I had another TMD interview but Brian was the manager that conducted the interview 

I feel like it was ok but I think it could have been better 

I don’t know why I feel anxious or nervous about it because I did it and it’s over but I’m going to take the time to acknowledge that I’m sure I did better than I’m thinking and that these is just a feeling. 

I’ll let it go and continue
“If you can imagine the worst case scenario, you can imagine the best case scenario too”
Turn what if to even if…
I keep living like change is supposed to be comfortable.
Reflected that I can choose better options and remember to acknowledge my emotions are not in control

I had a follow up with Brian about my interview and the opportunity for a walking interview. 

Turns out I did do better than I thought and my growth is visible

It did change my mood

I know I can still improve and that’s exciting. I can ask better questions. 

Being a leader yourself, what is the one word your choose to describe yourself as such? 

Do you have a piece of advice given to you by a mentor that helped you get to where you are now?
Started off in a neutral attitude and kind of went a little down but came back after my talk with Brian

Question on including someone on a project. 

Be more specific. An individual and what that project was (could be trying to increase sales) what did they do… etc

Other question on changing someone’s behavior (work on a more clear response)

Grateful for ai and having the ability to create things I wouldn’t be able to otherwise. 

Still need to work out the listing agent analysis in Claude but getting better every time

I feel good, I still just struggle a little on what to do and how to manage my time more efficiently

But I am grateful that I am always getting better and improving daily
I feel pretty calm. Almost would describe it as at peace

I feel excited. I get to do my “walking interview” in Evan’s tomorrow. 

I’m feeling a little nervous but that’s only because it’s something new
Grateful for the opportunity to do the walking interview and that it went so well
I feel good overall. Busy but exited for whatever opportunities I have coming my way

Had a very interesting and out of the ordinary encounter at king Soopers. 

Met a guy named Jackson and had a chit chat and exchanged numbers.  

Never experience anything like this before but intrigued by it and I’ll see what comes of it

Still need to work on letting things go. 

Cant let little things get to me or gain power over me. 

Move forward and get better 👌🏼
I’m grateful for feeling really good today

Had a small team but got a lot done and I’m proud of that. 

The interview the day before with Scott and Erin was great!

I’m feeling really good 👍🏻

Felt like we did an amazing job tonight as a team

Had a nice random pizza party and ice drink

Still going strong

I got the news that I got offered TMD!! 

It’s all come full circle

It almost feels unreal still

On the same day Patty was in an accident but thank God she is fine!

Been feeling busier but it’s a good busy

Have so many ideas and starting to choose actions
